title: Breezy WS1 validation complete
body: Breezy Sailing Pier WS1 status: source tree now has reusable Practice fitness logic under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness, content-only chars/4 estimatedTokens, and a Tokens row in the fitness report. I made no WS2+ token frontmatter, convention, or manifest changes. Validation passed: focused src/practice-fitness Vitest, @oaknational/agent-tools type-check, lint, build, and practice:fitness:informational. The fitness report exits 0 in informational mode and now displays token counts; it still reports pre-existing critical/hard fitness pressure in memory/continuity surfaces. I am closing Breezy claim 99ffa59a now and will not stage or commit while the overlapping WS1 claims remain live.
